# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_webapp (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Unique name of the app to create or update. To create or update a deployment slot, use the {slot} parameter.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of the resource group to which the resource belongs.

### Optional

- `always_on` (Boolean) Keeps the app loaded even when there's no traffic.
- `app_settings` (String) Configure web app application settings. Suboptions are in key value pair format.
- `app_state` (String) Start/Stop/Restart the web app.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `client_affinity_enabled` (Boolean) Whether or not to send session affinity cookies, which route client requests in the same session to the same instance.
- `container_settings` (String) Web app container settings.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_source` (String) Deployment source for git.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `frameworks` (String) Set of run time framework settings. Each setting is a dictionary. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/app-service/app-service-web-overview for more info.
- `ftps_state` (String) The state of the FTP/FTPS service.
- `http20_enabled` (Boolean) Configures a web site to allow clients to connect over HTTP 2.0.
- `https_only` (Boolean) Configures web site to accept only https requests.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Resource location. If not set, location from the resource group will be used as default.
- `min_tls_version` (String) The minimum TLS encryption version required for the app.
- `plan` (String) App service plan. Required for creation. Can be name of existing app service plan in same resource group as web app. Can be the resource ID of an existing app service plan. For example /subscriptions/<subs_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverFarms/<plan_name>. Can be a dict containing five parameters, defined below. `name`, name of app service plan. `resource_group`, resource group of the app service plan. `sku`, SKU of app service plan, allowed values listed on https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/app-service/linux/. `is_linux`, whether or not the app service plan is Linux. defaults to `False`. `number_of_workers`, number of workers for app service plan.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `purge_app_settings` (Boolean) Purge any existing application settings. Replace web app application settings with app_settings.
- `scm_type` (String) Repository type of deployment source, for example `LocalGit`, `GitHub`. List of supported values maintained at https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/appservice/webapps/createorupdate#scmtype.
- `site_auth_settings` (String) Configuration settings for the Azure App Service Authentication / Authorization feature.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `startup_file` (String) The web's startup file. Used only for Linux web apps.
- `state` (String) State of the Web App. Use `present` to create or update a Web App and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
